title: ageratina ibaguensis
intro: Ageratina ibaguensis, also known as Ibague Mint or Mountain Mint, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae), native to South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Ageratina ibaguensis include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Ageratina ibaguensis is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and antimicrobial properties.
